units.content: Schapira et al. address big data and benchmarking initiatives to bridge the gap from AlphaFold to drug design, in Nature Chemical Biology 20:937-940, 2024
The same mitigation as Karelina (v6.2.10) applies to this reference
Claim 8a is a pre-registered architectural predictor derived from attribute-set arithmetic
Claim 8a is not a post-hoc observational evaluation, distinguishing it from Schapira et al.
The pre-registered architectural nature of claim 8a mitigates the FTO risk posed by Schapira et al.
